name: No-Bake Coconut/Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 6 tablespoons cocoa, 1 cup coconut, and 3 cups oatmeal in a large bowl. Set aside.
2. In a saucepan, bring 1 stick margarine, 1/2 cup milk, and 2 cups sugar to a boil.
3. Continue boiling for 2 minutes, then add 1 teaspoon vanilla extract.
4. Pour the mixture over the oatmeal mixture and mix well until combined.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto wax paper.
6. Allow the cookies to set until firm.
